name: Natal chart ob3ect: the astrological birth chart — a snapshot of planetary positions at the moment of birth, forming the 12 houses, aspects, and sign placements. FSPLIT: the birth moment splits the unified sky into 12 houses (the mundane sphere) and the planets into their sign dignities and debilities. FFUSE: aspect integration reconstitutes the chart — the trines, squares, conjunctions, and oppositions weave the scattered placements into one coherent personality signature. VINIT: the sky before the birth moment. TANCH: the 360-degree circle of the ecliptic. AFWD: a planet in direct motion. AREV: a planet in retrograde. ENGAGR: a planet on the cusp — simultaneously in two houses or two signs.

phase_0.domain_name: Natal chart ob3ect: the astrological birth chart — a snapshot of planetary positions at the moment of birth, forming the 12 houses, aspects, and sign placements. FSPLIT: the birth moment splits the unified sky into 12 houses (the mundane sphere) and the planets into their sign dignities and debilities. FFUSE: aspect integration reconstitutes the chart — the trines, squares, conjunctions, and oppositions weave the scattered placements into one coherent personality signature. VINIT: the sky before the birth moment. TANCH: the 360-degree circle of the ecliptic. AFWD: a planet in direct motion. AREV: a planet in retrograde. ENGAGR: a planet on the cusp — simultaneously in two houses or two signs.

VINIT.chosen_element: the sky before the birth moment
VINIT.justification: void/uninitialized state before any planetary positions are fixed

TANCH.justification: terminal anchor that contains the entire chart system

AFWD.justification: forward morphism toward a target position

CLINK.chosen_element: the sequence of houses from 1st to 12th
CLINK.justification: composition of house placements in order

IMSCRIB.chosen_element: the natal chart as a whole
IMSCRIB.justification: self-recognition: the chart is identical to itself

FSPLIT.justification: splits the unified sky into 12 houses and planets into sign dignities/debilities

FFUSE.justification: reconstitutes the scattered placements into one coherent personality signature via trines, squares, conjunctions, oppositions

EVALT.chosen_element: a planet in its domicile or exaltation

EVALF.chosen_element: a planet in its detriment or fall

ENGAGR.justification: paradox: simultaneously in two houses or two signs

IFIX.chosen_element: the exact degree and minute of each planet at birth
IFIX.justification: permanent irreversible record of the birth moment

split_outputs: planets in sign dignities and debilities

phase_3.void_description: the sky before birth, no planets placed
phase_3.true_description: a planet in its domicile or exaltation
phase_3.false_description: a planet in its detriment or fall
phase_3.both_description: a planet on the cusp, in two houses or signs

steps.domain_action: Step 1 IMSCRIB: the chart recognizes itself as a unique snapshot
Step 2 AREV:   the planets descend into retrograde motion if applicable
Step 3 FSPLIT: the birth moment splits the sky into 12 houses and planets into dignities
Step 4 AFWD:   planets move forward in direct motion through signs
Step 5 FFUSE:  aspects integrate the scattered placements into a coherent signature
Step 6 CLINK:  the houses are composed in sequence from 1st to 12th
Step 7 IFIX:   the exact planetary degrees are permanently recorded
Step 8 IMSCRIB: the chart closes as a self-identical whole

phase_5.compiler_frontend: ephemeris tables and house system calculations
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: aspect angles (trine, square, conjunction, opposition) between planets
phase_5.memory_mechanism: the natal chart as a fixed diagram
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: the order of houses and planetary motions
phase_5.alfs_store: the canonical reference of zodiac signs and planetary rulerships

phase_6.cycle_cost: the precision of the birth time and location
phase_6.post_cycle_state: the fixed natal chart with all placements
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — the chart is a deterministic snapshot, no information lost
